_cite.reason: Span re-point (item 3): fact_span_not_in_source FACT whose span is verbatim in another pool source — re-point search_result_id/source_id/tier to the source that contains it. Deterministic, no LLM. Operator ruling 2026-07-04.

prior.claim_text: 22 May 2025: First country benchmarking implementing act published; 140 low-risk, 50 standard-risk, 4 high-risk countries classified.
prior.source_span: Yesterday (22 May 2025), The European Commission (EC) released its long-awaited first list of country risk classifications under the EU Deforestation Regulation (EUDR)
